message:
feat(web): add iOS accessory drawer with sticky modifiers

- Add collapsible drawer at bottom for touch-only devices
- Keys: Esc, Tab, Ctrl, Alt, Cmd (left) and arrows (right)
- Sticky modifiers work with both accessory keys and keyboard input
- CSS media query (hover: none, pointer: coarse) for touch detection
- Fix WebCodecs decoder to wait for keyframe before decoding
- Fix debug overlay to work with both #debug and ?debug params
